# CodeGrind Engagement Review Packet

## Campaign

- Title: DSA Practice Upgrades: Real-time AI Assist & Enhanced Problem Flow
- Summary: Showcase CodeGrind's refreshed practice loop: AI-assisted problem solving with Azure OpenAI, improved problem filtering, and a sharper UI flow that ties LeetCode-style challenges to real-time feedback.
- Slug: codegrind-dsa-practice-upgrade
- Content kind: image
- Target URL: https://codegrind.online

## Media plan

- Media source: generated
- Asset label: generated-codegrind-dsa-practice-upgrade
- Asset URL: https://rivie13.github.io/assets/images/codegrind-engagement/2026-07-15-codegrind-dsa-practice-upgrade.png
- Asset MIME: image/png
- Selection reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.

## Brief

- Core message: CodeGrind now blends LeetCode-style problems with an upgraded AI assistant, delivering real-time guidance, difficulty-aware filtering, and a more engaging problem-to-solution workflow. This centers practical practice, learning momentum, and tangible progress tracking for users exploring data structures and algorithms.
- CTA: Try the refreshed practice flow and share a screenshot of your first solved problem with AI guidance.
- Visual brief: Static hero-style banner: CodeGrind UI showing a code editor on one side and an AI assistant panel with a chat-like interface; include a solved problem badge and a subtle cyberpunk accent to reflect the CodeBreach aesthetic. Use bold title overlay: 'DSA Practice Upgrades'.

## Review notes

- Do not merge until the copy and selected media are acceptable for public posting.
- If the media choice is wrong, update the review PR branch or rerun the workflow with a different media manifest.
- Merging this PR only auto-posts engagement content if the Pages repo has the matching engagement-dispatch workflow installed.
